clusters.justification: Represents the broad, macro-level processing of valence, arousal, and emotional regulation predominantly subserved by the brain's salience and limbic pathways.
Captures the macroscopic computation of expected utility, incentive salience, and goal-directed choice mediated by cortico-striatal circuitry.
Encompasses internally-directed, abstract processing of self-referential and interpersonal representations typically anchored globally within the default mode network.
